source_rationale: KRT17 is a cytokeratin highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells, reflecting their basal-like but abnormal differentiation state
KRT8 is a luminal cytokeratin co-expressed in aberrant basaloid cells, distinguishing them from normal basal cells
TP63 is a basal cell transcription factor expressed at lower levels in aberrant basaloid cells, reflecting partial basal identity
COL1A1 expression in aberrant basaloid cells reflects their mesenchymal-like gene expression program
LAMB3 is a laminin subunit highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells associated with fibrotic lung disease
LAMC2 is a laminin gamma chain upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells, linked to epithelial-mesenchymal transition
VIM encodes vimentin, a mesenchymal intermediate filament expressed in aberrant basaloid cells reflecting their hybrid epithelial-mesenchymal state
CDKN2A (p16) is upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells, indicating cellular senescence features
SOX9 is a transcription factor expressed in aberrant basaloid cells, associated with progenitor-like and fibrotic phenotypes
AGER (RAGE) is a canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells, expressed on their apical surface and critical for gas exchange
PDPN (podoplanin/T1-alpha) is a transmembrane glycoprotein highly expressed on alveolar type 1 cells
AQP5 is a water channel protein expressed on the apical surface of alveolar type 1 cells, facilitating water transport
HOPX is a homeodomain transcription factor that marks alveolar type 1 cells and is required for their differentiation
CAV1 encodes caveolin-1, a structural protein of caveolae abundantly expressed in alveolar type 1 cells
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein enriched in alveolar type 1 cells
CLIC5 is a chloride intracellular channel protein expressed in alveolar type 1 cells
SFTPC encodes surfactant protein C, the most specific marker of alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPB encodes surfactant protein B, produced by alveolar type 2 cells for surfactant function
SFTPA1 encodes surfactant protein A1, a collectin produced by alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPD encodes surfactant protein D, secreted by alveolar type 2 cells for innate immune defense
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter essential for lamellar body formation in alveolar type 2 cells
NKX2-1 (TTF-1) is a transcription factor critical for lung epithelial differentiation, highly expressed in alveolar type 2 cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) is a lysosomal membrane protein enriched in lamellar bodies of alveolar type 2 cells
ETV5 is an ETS transcription factor important for alveolar type 2 cell maintenance and identity
SLC34A2 is a sodium-phosphate cotransporter highly expressed in alveolar type 2 cells
KRT5 is a canonical basal cell cytokeratin expressed in airway basal progenitor cells
KRT14 is a type I cytokeratin that pairs with KRT5 and is a well-established basal cell marker
TP63 is a master transcription factor essential for basal cell identity and self-renewal in stratified epithelia
KRT15 is a cytokeratin expressed in basal cells of the airway epithelium
ITGA6 (CD49f) is an integrin alpha-6 subunit expressed on basal cells mediating adhesion to the basement membrane
ITGB4 is an integrin beta-4 subunit that forms hemidesmosomes in basal cells for basement membrane attachment
NGFR (p75NTR) is a nerve growth factor receptor expressed on airway basal stem/progenitor cells
DLK2 is expressed in basal progenitor cells of the airway epithelium
FOXJ1 is a master transcription factor required for ciliogenesis and is the canonical marker of ciliated cells
DNAH5 encodes a dynein heavy chain essential for ciliary motility in ciliated airway epithelial cells
TPPP3 is a tubulin polymerization promoting protein enriched in ciliated cells
CAPS (calcyphosine) is highly expressed in ciliated epithelial cells of the airways
PIFO (pitchfork) is involved in cilia formation and is specifically expressed in ciliated cells
RSPH1 encodes a radial spoke head protein of motile cilia, marking ciliated cells
DNAI1 encodes a dynein intermediate chain required for outer dynein arm assembly in motile cilia
CCDC78 is a coiled-coil domain protein involved in centriole amplification during multiciliogenesis
TUBB4B is a beta-tubulin isoform enriched in ciliated cells, forming the axonemal microtubules
SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16/uteroglobin) is the canonical secretory protein of club cells in the airways
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin family member highly expressed in club cells
CYP2F1 is a cytochrome P450 enzyme preferentially expressed in club cells for xenobiotic metabolism
CYP2B6 is a cytochrome P450 enzyme expressed in club cells involved in detoxification
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin expressed in club cells of the airway epithelium
KRT7 is a cytokeratin expressed in club cells and other secretory airway epithelial cells
BPIFB1 is a bactericidal/permeability-increasing fold-containing protein expressed in airway secretory cells including club cells
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen alpha-1, the major extracellular matrix protein produced by fibroblasts
COL1A2 encodes type I collagen alpha-2, abundantly produced by fibroblasts
DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan highly expressed by fibroblasts that regulates collagen fibrillogenesis
LUM (lumican) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts in connective tissues
VIM encodes vimentin, the canonical mesenchymal intermediate filament expressed in fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a receptor tyrosine kinase that marks fibroblasts and is important for their proliferation and migration
THY1 (CD90) is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein expressed on fibroblast subsets in the lung
COL3A1 encodes type III collagen, a major extracellular matrix component produced by fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein expressed by fibroblasts
TCF21 is a transcription factor that marks lung fibroblasts and is involved in mesenchymal cell fate
MUC5AC is a gel-forming mucin that is the canonical secretory product of goblet cells in the airways
MUC5B is a gel-forming mucin produced by goblet cells and submucosal glands in the airways
SPDEF is a transcription factor that drives goblet cell differentiation in the airway epithelium
AGR2 is a protein disulfide isomerase required for mucin processing and highly expressed in goblet cells
TFF3 (trefoil factor 3) is a secretory peptide co-expressed with mucins in goblet cells
FCGBP is an IgG Fc-binding protein highly expressed in goblet cells and associated with mucus
CLCA1 is a calcium-activated chloride channel regulator expressed in goblet cells, involved in mucus secretion
MUC2 is a gel-forming mucin expressed in goblet cells, particularly in mucosal epithelia
FOXI1 is a forkhead transcription factor that is the master regulator and canonical marker of pulmonary ionocytes
CFTR is a chloride channel highly expressed in ionocytes, which are the major CFTR-expressing cells in the airway
ATP6V1C2 is a vacuolar ATPase subunit enriched in ionocytes, reflecting their ion transport function
ATP6V0D2 is a vacuolar ATPase subunit expressed in ionocytes for proton transport
ASCL3 is a transcription factor involved in ionocyte specification in the airway epithelium
CLCNKB is a chloride channel expressed in ionocytes, supporting their role in transepithelial ion transport
BSND (barttin) is a chloride channel accessory subunit expressed in ionocytes
PROX1 is the master transcription factor for lymphatic endothelial cell identity and differentiation
LYVE1 is a hyaluronan receptor that is a canonical marker of lymphatic endothelial cells
PDPN (podoplanin) is a glycoprotein highly expressed on lymphatic endothelial cells
FLT4 (VEGFR-3) is a VEGF receptor predominantly expressed on lymphatic endothelial cells
CCL21 is a chemokine produced by lymphatic endothelial cells to guide immune cell trafficking
MMRN1 (multimerin-1) is expressed in lymphatic endothelial cells
TBX1 is a transcription factor expressed in lymphatic endothelial cells involved in lymphatic development
PECAM1 (CD31) is an endothelial cell adhesion molecule expressed on both vascular and lymphatic endothelial cells
MSLN (mesothelin) is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein that is the canonical marker of mesothelial cells
WT1 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in mesothelial cells lining serous cavities
UPK3B (uroplakin 3B) is a transmembrane protein expressed on mesothelial cells
KRT19 is a cytokeratin expressed in mesothelial cells reflecting their epithelial characteristics
CALB2 (calretinin) is a calcium-binding protein used as a diagnostic marker for mesothelial cells
LRRN4 is a leucine-rich repeat protein enriched in mesothelial cells
HP (haptoglobin) is expressed by mesothelial cells in serous membranes
BNC1 (basonuclin-1) is a transcription factor expressed in mesothelial cells
ACTA2 (alpha-smooth muscle actin) is the canonical marker of myofibroblasts, reflecting their contractile phenotype
COL1A1 is highly expressed in myofibroblasts, which are major producers of extracellular matrix in fibrosis
COL3A1 encodes type III collagen abundantly produced by myofibroblasts during tissue remodeling
FN1 (fibronectin) is highly expressed by myofibroblasts and is a key component of the fibrotic matrix
POSTN (periostin) is a matricellular protein highly expressed by myofibroblasts in fibrotic tissues
TAGLN (transgelin/SM22) is an actin-binding protein expressed in myofibroblasts and smooth muscle cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain that can be expressed in highly contractile myofibroblasts
CTHRC1 is a collagen triple helix repeat protein highly expressed in pathological myofibroblasts
TGFBI is a TGF-beta-induced extracellular matrix protein expressed by myofibroblasts
PDGFRB is a receptor tyrosine kinase that is the canonical marker of pericytes and essential for their recruitment
CSPG4 (NG2) is a chondroitin sulfate proteoglycan expressed on pericytes surrounding microvessels
RGS5 is a regulator of G-protein signaling highly expressed in pericytes
NOTCH3 is a receptor expressed in pericytes and vascular mural cells, important for their specification
MCAM (CD146) is a cell adhesion molecule expressed on pericytes
DES (desmin) is an intermediate filament protein expressed in pericytes and smooth muscle cells
ABCC9 (SUR2) is a sulfonylurea receptor subunit enriched in pericytes
KCNJ8 is an inwardly rectifying potassium channel expressed in pericytes
HIGD1B is a mitochondrial protein enriched in pericytes in various tissues
CHGA (chromogranin A) is a neuroendocrine secretory granule protein and canonical marker of neuroendocrine cells
SYP (synaptophysin) is a synaptic vesicle glycoprotein expressed in neuroendocrine cells
ASCL1 is a basic helix-loop-helix transcription factor essential for pulmonary neuroendocrine cell differentiation
GRP (gastrin-releasing peptide/bombesin) is a neuropeptide produced by pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
CALCA (calcitonin/CGRP) is a neuropeptide gene expressed in pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
CHGB (chromogranin B) is a secretory granule protein expressed in neuroendocrine cells
INSM1 is a zinc-finger transcription factor that marks neuroendocrine differentiation
NCAM1 (CD56) is a neural cell adhesion molecule expressed on pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
ENO2 (neuron-specific enolase) is a glycolytic enzyme enriched in neuroendocrine cells
ACTA2 (alpha-smooth muscle actin) is a canonical contractile protein of smooth muscle cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle-specific myosin heavy chain and the most specific marker of differentiated smooth muscle cells
TAGLN (SM22-alpha) is an actin-binding protein highly expressed in smooth muscle cells
CNN1 (calponin-1) is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein involved in contraction
DES (desmin) is an intermediate filament protein expressed in smooth muscle cells
ACTG2 (gamma-2 smooth muscle actin) is specifically expressed in smooth muscle cells
MYLK (myosin light chain kinase) is essential for smooth muscle contraction and highly expressed in smooth muscle cells
MYOCD (myocardin) is a master transcriptional coactivator of smooth muscle gene expression
LMOD1 (leiomodin-1) is an actin nucleator specifically expressed in smooth muscle cells
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial cell adhesion molecule expressed on arterial endothelial cells
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein expressed on arterial endothelium
GJA5 (connexin 40) is a gap junction protein specifically expressed in arterial endothelial cells
EFNB2 (ephrin-B2) is a canonical arterial marker that distinguishes arterial from venous endothelium
DLL4 is a Notch ligand specifically expressed in arterial endothelial cells
HEY1 is a Notch target transcription factor enriched in arterial endothelial cells
SOX17 is a transcription factor that promotes arterial endothelial cell identity
BMX is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase preferentially expressed in arterial endothelial cells
SEMA3G is a semaphorin enriched in arterial endothelial cells
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on capillary endothelial cells
CA4 (carbonic anhydrase 4) is specifically expressed in general capillary (aerocyte-adjacent) endothelial cells of the lung
FCN3 (ficolin-3) is highly expressed in lung capillary endothelial cells of the general capillary type
SLC6A4 (serotonin transporter) is expressed in general capillary endothelial cells of the lung
GPIHBP1 is a GPI-anchored protein expressed on capillary endothelial cells that facilitates lipoprotein lipase transport
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial junction protein expressed on capillary endothelial cells
NOSTRIN is an eNOS trafficking inducer expressed in capillary endothelial cells
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on aerocyte capillary endothelial cells
EDNRB (endothelin receptor B) is enriched in aerocyte (capillary B) endothelial cells of the lung
HPGD (15-hydroxyprostaglandin dehydrogenase) is expressed in aerocyte capillary endothelial cells
APLN (apelin) is enriched in aerocyte endothelial cells specialized for gas exchange
IL1RL1 (ST2) is expressed in aerocyte capillary endothelial cells of the lung
TBX2 is a transcription factor expressed in aerocyte endothelial cells
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial junction protein expressed on aerocyte capillary endothelial cells
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on peribronchial vascular endothelial cells
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is expressed in peribronchial (bronchial) vascular endothelial cells
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial junction protein expressed on peribronchial endothelial cells
COL15A1 is a collagen expressed by bronchial vascular endothelial cells, distinguishing them from pulmonary capillaries
PLVAP is a plasmalemma vesicle-associated protein expressed in fenestrated and peribronchial endothelial cells
ACKR1 (DARC) is an atypical chemokine receptor expressed on peribronchial and venous endothelial cells
POSTN is expressed in peribronchial vascular endothelial cells in the systemic bronchial circulation
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on venous endothelial cells
ACKR1 (DARC) is an atypical chemokine receptor highly expressed on venous endothelial cells
NR2F2 (COUP-TFII) is a transcription factor that specifies venous endothelial cell identity
EPHB4 is an Eph receptor that is a canonical marker of venous endothelial cells
CDH5 (VE-cadherin) is an endothelial junction protein expressed on venous endothelial cells
SELP (P-selectin) is an adhesion molecule expressed on venous endothelial cells for leukocyte recruitment
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is expressed at high levels in venous endothelial cells
CLU (clusterin) is expressed in venous endothelial cells of the lung vasculature
ICAM1 is an adhesion molecule expressed on venous endothelial cells facilitating leukocyte transmigration
